header.title: Matchup Analyzer
header.subtitle: Simulate matchups with 10,000+ neural iterations and discover structural matchups.

tutorial.step1Desc: World rankings often lie. We load the recent form, biological data, and historical match statistics of both players to determine their true active performance level.
tutorial.step2Desc: Tennis is played on Clay, Grass, or Hard courts. Some players excel on fast grass but fail on slow clay. Our Court Speed Index (BSI) simulates the exact court speed.
tutorial.step3Desc: Instead of guessing, our AI simulates the match point-by-point 10,000 times. We calculate service pressure, break probabilities, and mental strength during clutch moments.
tutorial.step4Desc: We reveal the key performance indicators like service pressure, forehand dictation, and physical stamina, letting you see exactly where the winning mismatch lies.

matchup.vaultEmptyDesc: You haven't saved any tactical intel yet. Run an analysis in the Scanner and save it to build your personal library.

valueScanner.premiumDesc: The Value Scanner identifies mathematical pre-match edges. Upgrade to Elite to access this professional trading tool.

banner.title: What is a Value Pick?
banner.desc: Our AI calculates the 'Fair Probability' for each match. If NEO.bet's odds are higher than our fair odds, it represents a 'Value Pick'—giving you a mathematical advantage.

tutorial.step1Desc: Imagine a coin toss. Heads has a 50% chance, meaning a fair reward is 2.00. If someone offers you 2.20, that extra reward is 'Value'. We find these mispriced bets for you.
tutorial.step2Desc: Our AI analyzes millions of data points to calculate the real win probability (the 'True Fair' odds). When bookmaker odds are higher than our True Fair odds, you have a mathematical 'Edge'.
tutorial.step3Desc: Never risk your whole bankroll! We recommend a precise stake in 'Units' (e.g. 1.5u or 3u) based on the edge size. 1 Unit is typically 1% of your total betting bankroll.
tutorial.step4Desc: Value is often hidden beyond simple match wins. We scan Set Handicaps, Game Totals, and Set Scores. Click any card to see details or link directly to place it on NEO.bet.

performance.title: Performance Ledger
performance.subtitle: Transparency is our core value. This ledger tracks every single AI prediction, win or loss, in real-time.

noData.title: No Data Yet
noData.message: Once the AI verifies match results, they will appear here automatically.

performance.brierDesc: The Brier score measures the absolute calibration of our fair odds probabilities. It quantifies the mean squared prediction error against actual match outcomes.
performance.brierFootnote: A lower Brier score confirms that the AI computes probabilities matching mathematical reality.
performance.pValueDesc: The p-value is based on the prestigious Buchdahl t-test for betting efficiency. It calculates the probability that our performance (ROI) is a product of pure luck or random variance.
performance.pValueFootnote: Our current skill certainty is {{certainty}}%, proving mathematically that we are beating the market.

oracle.upsellSubtitle: Use the Value Scanner to find mathematical mistakes in the bookmakers' odds.

tutorial.step1Desc: BSI rating measures how fast a tennis court plays, from 1.0 (extremely slow clay) to 10.0 (extremely fast grass). Slow courts favor long rallies, while fast courts favor powerful servers.
tutorial.step2Desc: Different courts bounce balls higher or lower. Clay produces high, slow bounces. Grass produces low, fast, skidding bounces that are harder to hit and require quick reactions.
tutorial.step3Desc: A player with a high ELO rating on Clay might lose on Grass against a lower-ranked player who excels on fast courts. We simulate these surface-specific match variables.

header.title: Player Score
header.subtitle: Benchmark Legend.
header.descriptionPart1: This scale defines the tactical and physical context of the
header.descriptionPart2: used across all professional scouting reports.

elite.title: Elite / World Class
elite.desc: Top 20 Global Ranking. Player shows clear advantages over the majority of the professional field.

atpTour.title: ATP Tour Standard
atpTour.desc: Established players on the Main Tour (ATP 250/500 Level). Consistently competes at the Top 100 level.

challenger.title: Challenger Regular
challenger.desc: Player consistently plays in Challenger Main Draws or ATP Qualifications. Solid professional level.

itfTop.title: ITF Future Top
itfTop.desc: Player regularly reaches ITF semifinals/finals and shows potential to break onto the Challenger Tour.

itfStandard.title: ITF Future Standard
itfStandard.desc: Player consistently winning qualification matches and competes regularly in the Main Draw of ITF events.

entry.title: Entry Level
entry.desc: Player is new to the professional circuit, primarily competing in qualifications or lower-level ITFs.

scoresBenchmark.footer: The overall rating is a weighted average of technical skills, physical conditioning & mental game.

loadManagement.title: Physiological Load Status
loadManagement.comebackDesc: Measures the player's capacity to salvage a victory after losing the opening set, calculated from their recent match history logs.

intelligence.defaultMental: Mental resilience indicators are standard. No specific composure alerts generated.

scouting.defaultStrengths: Elite baseline play, powerful first serve, and quick lateral court speed.
scouting.defaultWeaknesses: Vulnerable under pressure on second serve return; occasional unforced errors on high-bounce forehands.
scouting.defaultMental: Maintains high concentration levels. Demonstrates solid resilience in tiebreaks but occasionally lacks composure when facing early breaks.

landing.subheadline: We combine visual surface physics (BSI), institutional-grade data, and proprietary neural networks to expose market inefficiencies.
landing.gridSubtitle: Real-time processing of complex tennis metrics.
landing.scoutIntelDesc: Our system generates comprehensive "Raw Intel" reports. It evaluates tactical matchups, historical performance, and real-time form to predict outcomes with high confidence.
landing.visualBsiDesc: We analyze video feeds to determine the actual Bounce Speed Index of the court.
landing.marketPulseDesc: Aggregating market data to identify probability discrepancies against our neural models.
landing.disclaimer: BACKHAND.DTL is a data analytics platform for informational purposes only. We are not a bookmaker, do not accept bets, and do not provide financial advice. Historical player data and matchup statistics are powered by data from Jeff Sackmann (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, non-commercial only). Sports analysis involves risk. Please use responsibly.

landing.cookiesDesc: We use proprietary encryption and anonymized analytical models (PostHog) to optimize your experience. Strictly necessary cookies are used for authentication. By continuing, you agree to our institutional privacy standards.

explainer.step1Desc: We scan global data streams without delay. As soon as a line moves, you see it instantly.
explainer.step2Desc: Our AI sees the court. We calculate the Bounce Speed Index (BSI) from live video feeds.
explainer.step3Desc: Deep-learning models analyze psychological and tactical matchups based on 10,000+ matches.
explainer.step4Desc: We compare our 'Fair Value' calculation with the market consensus. We alert you when the variance is >5%.
